calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500223 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73500223 --event evt-petition-disposition --role predictor","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73500223 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort && find . -path '*73500223*' -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

{"cell_id": "20", "max_tokens": 20000, "yield_time_ms": 30000}

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"PruneYard\" \"Cedar Point\"",filed_after:"2021-06-23",filed_before:"2026-07-18",order_by:"score desc",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court_citation_string","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content??[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"CDK Global LLC v. Brnovich",num_results:3,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","absolute_url","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r?.content??[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:5125303,fields:["id","html_with_citations","plain_text"]}); for (const c of (r?.content??[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73500223/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z/flags.json && echo no-existing-flags","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"out=data/cases/scotus/73500223/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260718T064904Z
find "$out" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
jq empty "$out/prediction.json" "$out/tooling.json"
git status --short --untracked-files=all
UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
